purpose: Close four reviewed held candidates after promotion through D-1000 BX16 without rewriting the historical base resolution index.

entries.notes: D-1000 BX16 completed current first-party and independent evidence review and promoted the held Avantis candidate as canonical entity hei_ex_000978. The candidate must not remain open or return as new growth work.

D-1000 BX16 completed current first-party and independent evidence review and promoted the held Pacifica Perps candidate as canonical Pacifica entity hei_ex_000980. The candidate must not remain open or return as new growth work.

D-1000 BX16 completed current first-party and independent evidence review and promoted the held Manifest Trade candidate as canonical entity hei_ex_000981. The candidate must not remain open or return as new growth work.
